title: rubus × pellitus
intro: Rubus × pellitus, also known as the Loganberry or a hybrid of the blackberry, is a thorny shrub belonging to the Rosaceae family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of Rubus × pellitus include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Rubus × pellitus can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, tinctures, and jams, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties for various health benefits.
